title: cotula discolor
intro: Cotula discolor, also known as Yellow Buttons or Australian Daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. Cotula discolor can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation.
